chapters.text: Pethu’el chapa Joel henga Pakai thusei hung lhung chu:
Tehse hon hiche hi ngaiyuvin lang, Gamsunga cheng mi jousen nakol sung cheh-uvin! Hitobang thilpi hi nang ho khang hihen Napu napateu khang hijongleh soh kha mong nam?
Nanghon nachate seipeh uvin lang Nachateuvin jong achateu seipeh son’u hen, Chujongleh amaho chaten jong Achateu ma seipeh son son kit’u hen.
Thingnget neh ban chengse chu Khaokhoten ane chaitauvin; Khaokhoten aneh banse se jong chu Khaokhopin ane chaitauve; Khaokhopite neh banse se jong Ijakai sumang thei khaokhon anechaitai.
Jukhamho thouvun lang kap’uvin, Ju don’a hatjouse kap soh keiyuvin; Nakam sunguva kona ju lhumsel akisuh mang jeh hin Kap kap jenguvin.

Ajeh chu kagamsung dou din Mihem nam khat ahung kontou jengun, Athau ahat thei lheh jengin Mijat jong simsen ahipouve; Ahahem dan jong sakei bahkaite ha tobang ahin, Sakei bahkaipi hagu nei bangin agu aneiye.
Hiche mite hin kalengpilei asuchaitan. Katheichang phung jong asubong tauve; Abahjouse amalngimsel tan asep lhasoh tai. Abah dung jouse akeovin agosoh hel tai.
Asenji thia ajipa ka ka jeng Khaodip pon kisil’a kap nu-ngah ji nei til bangin kap’uvin.
Lhosoh thilto le lengpitwi thilto jong abeitan. Pakai houina konin akipaidoh tai. Thempuho jong alunghem’uvin. Pakai kinbol lhachaho chu alunghem tauve.
Loulai jouse jong akeovin akijamsoh tan. Leiset tol lah jong alunghem tai; Ijeh-inem itileh chang jouse akisu mang tan, Lengpithei jong agatapon thao jong abeitai.
Vo lou lhouva pang ho lung donguvin. Vo lengpithei malngim ho lunghem’uvin; Suhlou chang le sakol chang ngaichan kap’uvin. Ajeh diu louva chang at ding abeisoh tai.

Lengpithei agop tan, Theichang phung jong abeihei hoi tai; Kolbuthei jong, tumphung jong, theithup phung jong Loulaiya thing phung abonchan agosoh tauve: Hijeh chun mihem chapatea kona Kipa thanopna ding abeisoh tai.

Vo thempuho, khaodip pon kisil’uvin lang kap’uvin. Kap’uvin maicham phunga lhacha thempuho! Lut’uvin lang jan khovah vah-in Khaodip pon jeng kisil khovah den’uvin; Vo ka-Pathen lhacha pang ho! Ajeh chu na-Pathenu houina konin Lhosoh thilto leh lengpitwi thilto jong akisubei soh keiyin ahitai.
An ngol’uvin lang Khoppi theng kouvun. Upa ho koukhom’uvin lang Gamsunga cheng mite abonchan koukhomun, Pakai na-Pathenu ina hung kikhom’uvin, Pakai henga taovun.
Ohe nikho ahung lhun ding chu! Pakai nikho chu ahung naiye, Hatchungnung Pathena kona Manthahna nikho chu ahunge.
Eiho mitmua neh ding an kisumang hilou hiya, I-Pathenu houina kona kipa le thanopna beisoh hilou hitam?
Lei noiya muchi akihulgo soh tan, Thil kholna in jouse jong akeovin aumsoh tai; Chang phatea alhun loujeh-in Changsal jouse jong amohset soh ahitai.
Gamsa jouse jong itobanga gentheiya um hiuvam! Bong hon le gancha jouse alung dongsoh tan, Aneh diu hamhing abeisoh phat hin Kelngoihon lah a kelngoite geiyin alung dong tauve.
O Pakai, nahenga hung tao kahi! Ajeh chu gammang lah geiyin meiyin akavamin, Lou laiya thingphung jouse jong Meikongin aleuchai sohtai.
Vadung jouse akansoh phat hin Gamsa ho geiyin nahenga ahung taotauve; Gammang lah a hamhing jouse geiyin Meikongin akavamsoh tai.
Zion lhanga sumkon mut’uvin lang, Keima lhang theng chunga kiginna khongpi vouvin! Gamsunga cheng jouse kihot lhulsoh keiyu hen, Ajeh chu Pakai nikho ahungin anai lheh tai.

Hiche nikho chu muthim ni leh lung jin ni ahin, Meibol nikho leh muthim lhangkhal kiheh nikho ahi! Molsang vum dung jousea chun Nasa tah le thanei tah mihem nam khat bangin Lhah deh duh-in atomjol’uvin Avom hang hel hul jenguve; Hitobang hi masangin jong anasoh kha hih laiyin, Akhang khanga jong hungsoh kit louhel ding ahi.
Amasangu meiyin chaive vun aka kajengin, Anunguva jong meikong alengje ju jenge. Amasanguva gamsung hi Eden hon abangin, Anung sanguva vang ahomkeovin aumjin imacha ahoidoh aumpoi.
Aumchan u jong sakolte umchan tobang ahin, Galsatna sakolte bangin alhai lhai jenguve.

Ahusanglet lutjeng uvin kangtalai tampi gin abangin, Molsang vum dung jousea alhuh lhuh-in akiseuvin, Meiyin changpol akah a apochet chut bangin Apoh the thu’uvin; Galmuna pang dinga kigoltoh Sepaite thahat tah tobang ahiuve.
Amasang sanguva mitin vaipi alungkham kham’uvin, Amai nguisoh keiyuvin akihol lel gamtauve.
Gal-hang ho bangin adelkhum khum jengun, Sepaite bangin pal dung jouse atomlhah-un aketchaitauve. Amasang cheh akijot soh keiyuvin, Alampia kiheidoh jong aum pouve.
Khat le khat jong akinehto hih hel’uvin, Ajotna ding lampi cheh a cheuvin ahi; Thalpi chang jah lah lah a ahung len vangin Ading deh pouvin ajotpai tei teiyui.
Khopi jengjong atomchah soh keiyuvin, Pal dung jousea avah chansoh hel’uve; Inchung dung jousea akaldoh soh keiyun,
Amasanguva ling akihot leu jengin, Van geiyin akilingin akihot nem jenge; Nisa le lhathah geiyin athimdel tan, Ahsi jouse jong avah tapouve.

Pakaiyin asepaite masanga thu ahinseiyin, Asepaite hi anasa behseh jeng uvin ahi; Athu hinseidoh Pathen chu Atha ahat behseh jengin ahi. Ajeh chu Pakai nikho kiti hi anasa behseh jengin Tijat a um lheh jenge; Koi ham Hiche nikho doujou ding chu?
Pakaiyin aseiyin, “Tu hijeng jongleh, Nalungthim pumpiuvin kahenga hung kile kit’uvin, An ngolto thon, Kap le maovin hunguvin;

Nalungthimu joh bot-eh uvin, Naponsil’u bot-eh hih uvin,” ati. Pakai na-Pathen henga hung kile kit tauvin, Ajeh chu Pakai milungset them hepi them ahi; Lung jong lung hangvah lou, longlouva lungset jing, Thilsea kona alung khelji thei ahi.

Ama hung kihei kit da hen lung khelda jong leh Kon ija ahet ding ham? Anunga phattheina dalhah peh da hen. Lhosoh thilto le lengpitwi thilto donda hen, Umjeng jongleh kon ija ahet am? Ajeh chu ama hi Pakai na-Pathenu hilou ham?
Zion lhanga sumkon mut’uvin lang, An ngol din phong uvin: Kikhoppi theng tah khat Nei dingin kouvun;

Mipi khom’uvin lang, Houbung chu sutheng uvin; Upa ho kou khom’uvin lang, Chapang nao noichep geiyin khom’uvin; Jinei thah bih beh pasal’in jong ajitoh age-na dalha hen, Jinei thah bih beh numeiyin jong ajitoh age-na dalha jeng hen.

Hongcha le maicham kikah laiya chun Thempuho le Pakai lhacha ho kap’u hen, “Vo Pakai, namite hinghoiyin, Nangma goulo mite hi houset’in umsah dan, Namtin vaipi lah a seichah din umsah hih-in, Ipi dia miho hin mitin lah a ‘A-Pathenu hoiya umba hitam?’ tia Asei diu ham?” tin seiyu hen.
Chuphat’in Pakaiyin agamsung din thangset abol’in, Amite chunga jong dip damna aneitai.

Hijeh chun Pakaiyin amite ahouvin aseitai, “Ven, keiman chang kapeh diu, Lengpitwi kapeh diu, thaotwi jong kapeh diu, Chutengleh nava va naneh uva nachim chim a nadon diu ahi; Chutah le kenjong namtin vaipi lah a Seiset’a kaumsah lou diu ahitai.

“Nakom’uva kona sahlama galkonpa kadelmanga, Amasanga pang ho jong niso lam Twikhanglena kadel lut ding, Anunga pang ho jong nilhum lam Twikhanglena kadel lut ding ahi; Chutah le anam le aui kitungdoh vel vul ding ahi, Ajeh chu aman thil nasa tah tah aboltai.
“Vo gamsung mite kicha hih uvin: Kipah thanom jouvin; Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin Thil loupi tah tah aboltai!
Gamlah a gamsa jouse jong kicha hih uvin, Ajeh chu gammang lah a hamhing adongsoh tai; Thingphung jouse jong agasoh tan, Theichang phung le lengpigui jong lhingset set’in aga lhon tai.

“Zion chate, kipah thanom’uvin, Pakai na-Pathen chunguva kipahuvin; Nang ho mitdohna din aman go amajuh sah tan, Gotwi neng tah a naneina diuvin asunlhah thoi; Masang laiya bang bangin Go masa le go nukhah ajuhsah gel theiye.
“Changphol jouse chang dimsoh ding, Bel le kong jouse lengpi twi le thaotwi letsoh ding ahi.
Keiman nahenguva kahinsol kasepaite Khaosut le khaokhopi, khongbai le thinglung Amahon aneh chaisau kum chujat sunga mangthah ho chu Kasemphat soh kei kit ding ahi.
“Nanghon na-oiva vauva naneh uva, Nakom’uva kidangtah a cheng jing Pakai na-Pathenu min chu Nanghon navahchoi choi diu ahi. Chutengleh kamite hi Kijumso kit lou diu ahitai.
Chutengleh Israel lailunga kaum jing hi nahet’uva Pakai na-Pathenu kei tailou adang aumpoi, ti nahet diu ahiye. Chutengleh kamite hi Kijumso kit lou diu ahitai.

“Khonung tengleh hitia hi hung um ding ahi. Keiman mihem tahsa a hing ho chunga kalhagao kabuh lhah ding ahin; Nachateu pasal jouse leh numei jousen jong Gaothu aseidoh uva, Namiteu upa tehse hon jong mang anei diu, Nagol lhang jouseuvin jong themgao thilmu banga thil amu diu ahi.
Soh pasal ho le soh numei ho chung geiya Hiche nikho laiya hi kalhagao kabuh lhah ding ahi.
“Keiman van chung dung le leiset chunga hi thisan le meikong chule meikhua melchihna phabep kavetsah ding ahi.
Nisa hung thimin tin, lhathah jong thisan soh ding, Pakai nikho tijat umtah le loupi tah hung lhun masanga hicheng hi hungsoh ding ahi.

Chutah leh Pakai mina tao chan chu kihuhdoh tei tei ding ahi; ajeh chu Pakaiyin asei masah sa ahingdoh ho lah a Pakaiyin akoudoh um ding mong ahi, tia asei banga chu Zion molsang chung le Jerusalem khopi sunga ajamdoh umtei ding ahi.
“Ijeh-inem itileh vetan, keiman Judah gam le Jerusalem khopi hamphatna dinga kasemphat teng, chulaiya hiche kasemphat phat tah chuleh,

namtin vaipi aboncha kakhop soh keiya Jehosh’aphat phaichama kapuilut ding, hikoma chu kamite kagoulo banga um Israelte jal’a namtin vaipi chunga thu katan ding ahi; ajeh chu amahon Israelte hi namtin vaipi lah a alhoh thangsoh keiyuvin, kagamsung geiyin akihom tauve;

kamite jong chu achan ding akichu’uvin vang asan’uvin, chapang pasal ho jong numei notiho toh akilheh jiuvin, nu-ngah khat geiyin jong lengpitwi man din akijoh jiuve; chutengleh alengpitwi chu akham avan adon’uvin ahi.

“Vo Tyre gam le Sidon lhang, chule Philistia lang jouse, kei dinga nang ho hi ipia kibol nahiu vam? Nang ho hi kachunga phu la dia kigo nahiu vam? Nang hon kachunga phu lah ding natiuva ahileh, kenjong natohnau chu hetman louhel mitphet kah louva nalujang uva kasun lhah peh diu ahi.
Ajeh chu nang hon keima dangka le sana nalauvin, kakholsa thil manlu tah tah ho jeng jong napo manguvin, nahouin dunguva nakikoisoh tauve.
Nang hon Judah mite le Jerusalem kho mite chu Greek mite henga najoh manguvin, agamgi kalpeh peh uva nathah mangsoh tauve.
Neihin vetan, nang hon najoh nau muna kona amaho chu katildoh soh keiya, nalubuh cheh-uva natoh nau chu kalethuh cheh ding nahiuve.
Nachateu pasal ho jong numeiho jong Judah mite chapa ho khut’a kajoh doh a, amahon hetphah lou gama cheng Sabea gam mite henga ajoh mang kit diu ahi; ajeh chu Pakaiyin aseisa ahitai,” ati.

Namtin vaipi lah a gaphongjal leuvin hiche thu hi; Galkon din kiginguvin lang, Mi thahat gal-hang jouse Gatilkhou soh keiyuvin, Galsat thei pasal jousen chemjam kisadoh cheh hen, Abonchan hung kontou jengu hen.
Natuchau chu chemjamin kikhen’uvin lang Nakangkuiyu chu tengchan kikhen’uvin; Mi lhasam tah jong chun “Gal-hat kahiye,” tin seijo hen.
Kinloiyin hung kikhom’uvin, Akimvel’a namtin vaipi Nang ho le nang ho hung kikhom’uvin, O Pakai, nagal hatte hinpui lhan.
Namtin vaipi amaho le amaho kitildoh u hen lang Jehosh’aphat phaichama hung kontouvu hen; Hikoma chu keiman akimvela cheng Namtin vaipi aboncha athu u katan ding ahi.
Koite kipat tauvin, Chang-at phat ahitai. Lut’uvin lang chil lhaloiyun. Lengpithei chilna kong adimsoh tai. Bel le kong jouse jong alet lhan ahi. Ajeh chu agitlou nau anasa behseh jenge.
Thutanna phaichama chun Mihona mihon jeng adimtai! Ajeh chu thutanna phaichama hin Pakai nikho hung lhun ding anaiye.
Nisa le lhathah jong athimtai. Ahsi jouse jong avah tapouve. Judah dinga huhdohna

Zion lhanga konin Pakai ahung kisenin, Jerusalema konin a-ogin thong leuvin thu aseiye; Hijeh chun vanmun jouse le leiset jong akilingsoh tan. Ahinla amite din Pakai chu kiselna ahijinge; Israel chate din Akulpiuvin apang jing jenge.
“Chutah le kei hi Pakai na-Pathenu Ka-lhang theng Ziona chengpa kahi nahet diu ahi. Chutengle Jerusalem chu athenga uma Kholgama midangin ajotpa kit louhel ding ahitai.

“Hiche nikho teng chuleh Molsang dung jousea lengpitwi lhum longa, Lhang dung jousea jong Bongnoi hung long ding; Judah gamsunga vakom dung jouse Twi dimsoh hel ding neng jeng junga long ding ahi; Pakai houina kona twinah khat hung umdoh a Shittim phai achapnou soh hel ding ahi.
“Egypt gam jong ahomkeovin hung lumin tin, Edom jong ahomkeova gammang lah sohdoh ding ahi; Ajeh chu amahon Judah mite chu pumhat jengin abol’uvin, Agamsunguva themmona bei mite thisan asouve.
Ahinla Judah gam hi tonsot’a chenna kinei ding, Jerusalem khopi jong akhang khanga kichenpha ding ahi.
Keiman athisan phu’u kalah peh ding, Themmona neiho chu kamoh suh map lou ding ahi. Ajeh chu Pakai hi Zion lhanga cheng jing ahiye,” ati.
